creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to VVD from comment #54)

At the moment there are only following ports left if you don't include the bugs from "Depends on" that are still open:

- comms/py-lirc (can be ignored, because it's not compatible with Python 3.x, see also bug #254271)
- devel/gitinspector
- sysutils/nagstamon
- devel/py-ice37
- x11-fonts/py-opentype-sanitizer


Following ports are already fixed:

- astro/py-sgp4, fixed in ports r567103
- databases/py-xapian, fixed in ports r567134
- devel/py-simpleparse, fixed in ports r567689
- math/e-antic, fixed in ports r567326
- science/tfel, fixed in ports r566814
- textproc/py-hunspell, fixed in ports r567326
